scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install
scripts.reset: rm -f backend/pennylog.db backend/pennylog.db-shm backend/pennylog.db-wal e2e/pennylog.test.db e2e/pennylog.test.db-shm e2e/pennylog.test.db-wal
